subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150312827 is not a GRB
body:
P. Jenke (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 447882634/150312827
at 19:50:31.31 UT on the 12th of March 2015, tentatively classified
as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to a
solar flare."
